text.title: Indie Hacker Tax and Legal Essentials Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Founder charging real money OR ≤30 days from go-live?

branch.question: Operating jurisdiction known AND customer locations identifiable?
